summary: Summary: Speaker2 opens excitedly by describing an onstage concert proposal that got a yes; Speaker1 replies with surprise and happiness, praising the romantic moment. Speaker2 then excitedly recounts how the fiancée freaked out and couldn't say no in front of thousands, while Speaker1 is excited and amused, asking about timing and suggesting a winter wedding or snowy honeymoon. As planning continues, Speaker1 expresses excitement and happiness and asks about family reactions, and Speaker2 responds excitedly, expresses gratitude and at times neutral as they work through details. The conversation moves chronologically from an excited engagement story through upbeat wedding planning into optimistic future planning, with Speaker1 largely excited and happy and Speaker2 largely excited and happy with occasional neutral moments.
